task_completion.description: Verify the Maven project directory 'gs-maven' is created at the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output or IDE project explorer showing the directory path '~/IdeaProjects/gs-maven' or '/home/ga/IdeaProjects/gs-maven'.

task_completion.description: Verify the pom.xml contains the correct groupId and artifactId.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pom.xml file open in an editor showing '<groupId>org.springframework</groupId>' and '<artifactId>gs-maven</artifactId>'.

task_completion.description: Verify the pom.xml includes the joda-time dependency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pom.xml file open in an editor showing a '<dependency>' block for 'joda-time'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Greeter class exists in the 'hello' package and provides a greeting message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Greeter.java open in an editor showing 'package hello;' and a method that returns a greeting string (e.g., 'Hello world!').

task_completion.description: Verify the HelloWorld main class exists in the 'hello' package and utilizes joda-time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: HelloWorld.java open in an editor showing 'package hello;', an import statement for 'org.joda.time.*' (e.g., LocalTime), a 'public static void main' method, and usage of the Greeter class.
A terminal or IDE build output window showing a successful Maven build (e.g., 'BUILD SUCCESS') or the presence of compiled .class files in the target directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used an actual IDE or text editor to create and edit the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real editor interface (like IntelliJ IDEA, VS Code, vim, or nano) rather than just echoing text directly into files without opening them.

integrity.description: Ensure the compilation was genuinely executed using Maven.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or IDE shows a real Maven build command (e.g., 'mvn compile', 'mvn package') being executed with standard Maven log output, not just a text file containing 'BUILD SUCCESS'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the task by directly cloning the completed official repository.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of 'git clone https://github.com/spring-attic/gs-maven' in the terminal history; evidence points to manual file creation or standard IDE project generation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project must be located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/gs-maven. The pom.xml must contain <groupId>org.springframework</groupId> and <artifactId>gs-maven</artifactId>, along with a dependency for joda-time. The Java files must be in the 'hello' package. HelloWorld.java should import org.joda.time.LocalTime and instantiate Greeter. Greeter.java should have a method returning a greeting like 'Hello world!'. The project must compile successfully, typically evidenced by a Maven 'BUILD SUCCESS' message.
